name: Unbox Commerce
notes: Unbox Commerce Ltd is a UK-registered company incorporated July 2024, HQ London. Social commerce infrastructure platform. No public website domain found in search results.

name: Persona
notes: Persona Identities, Inc. — identity verification platform (KYC/AML). Founded 2018 by Charles Yeh and Rick Song. ~654 employees. Clear match.

name: Persona AI
notes: Persona AI Inc — industrial humanoid robotics. Founded 2024 by Nic Radford and Jerry Pratt. HQ at 4201 Main St, Suite 170, Houston TX. Raised $42M. Distinct from Persona (withpersona.com).

name: Botbot
notes: Botbot.AI — enterprise chatbot and productivity platform headquartered in Singapore (Central Singapore). Built for Asian enterprise market.

name: Firesale
notes: AI-powered resale marketplace founded June 2025 by Anthony Longo. HQ Delray Beach, FL. Also uses firesale.ai domain. Multiple older Firesale companies exist (Colorado Springs, Boulder) but this is the active funded startup matching the timeframe.

name: Ask Sheldon
notes: Could not identify a startup company named 'Ask Sheldon'. Search results returned an unrelated personal tech blog (ask-sheldon.com), Sheldon AI in Colorado, and Sheldon Law Group. No company profile found on Crunchbase, PitchBook, or other databases matching this name.

name: Smore
notes: Smore is an Israeli startup (Tel Aviv / Ramat Gan) that makes K-12 digital newsletters. Founded 2011. Acquired by SchoolStatus (Mississippi) in December 2022, but company was originally Israeli-founded and HQ was Israel.

name: InstaFi
notes: InstaFi — AI-powered banking/lending platform for hard money lenders and construction credit. Founded 2024 by Harry Kumar. HQ Chattanooga, TN. No public website URL confirmed in search results.

name: UniqLearn
notes: UniqLearn Inc — AI-personalized K-12 learning platform. Founded by Aidan McDowell (NYU Gallatin '25) and Daniel Kenigsberg (NYU Tandon '25). Won $75K at NYU Stern Entrepreneurs Challenge 2024. NY-based via NYU affiliation; no explicit street address found.

name: FlaFlow
notes: FlaFlow — digital platform for interactive dashboards, workflows, and data automation. HQ Mountain View, CA per PitchBook. Website flaflow.com confirmed.

name: Farad Works
notes: Faradworks — AI-native tools for electronics/PCB design and validation. Flagship product PinScope. Founded 2024, HQ New York, NY. Raised $200K pre-seed from Antler (April 2025). Domain confirmed as faradworks.com.

name: Wagr
notes: Wagr Inc — peer-to-peer sports betting platform. Founded 2020, HQ Nashville, TN. First P2P betting platform live in Tennessee. Raised $12M Series A (Kraft Group, Pear Ventures). Acquired by Yahoo Sports in 2023.
